Package javax.media.mscontrol.mixer

A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream.

See:
          Description

Interface Summary
MediaMixer This class is required when the application needs to mix (or add, or sum) multiple media streams into a single one.
MixerAdapter A MixerAdapter is the materialization of a "Mixer port".
MixerEvent Defines the events sent by a Mixer
 

Package javax.media.mscontrol.mixer Description

A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream.

Package Specification

A MediaMixer can send MixerEvent's up to its session.
A MixerAdapter gathers the media processing resources attached to a given mixer port.
